settings.heading: Self-care first, period
settings.subheading: Blume helps you customize your self-care routine for every day of the month.

settings.headline: I am absolutely in love!
settings.paragraph: Blume was kind enough to send me their new milky fade to try out and the results speak for themselves! This is only 8 days of using the Milky Fade!! I use two pumps every morning and night after I wash my face and proceed with my normal skin care routine! I haven’t felt confident in my own skin in a year up until now! Thank you so much Blume for sending me The milky fade! I am absolutely in love!
settings.name: Analea Nicole

settings.headline: Seriously life-changing!
settings.paragraph: I've suffered from hormonal acne for years, and I decided to give Meltdown a shot. Well, let me tell you that this stuff is the real deal & worth every penny! I think my photos speak for themselves, but the before pic was taken a month ago, a few days before my period when my acne was out of control. I seriously cannot believe what a difference this product has made! Seriously life-changing!
settings.name: Melissa Gerbereux

settings.headline: I can’t be happier with my skin!
settings.paragraph: Just wanted to say your products saved my life!!! I’ve never really suffered from acne and when I turned 23, I developed adult acne and felt so lost and confused. I’m so glad I went out on faith and ordered your products I can’t be happier with my skin. Thank you <3
settings.name: Helenia Beats

settings.headline: OBSESSED!
settings.paragraph: I have been fighting new acne for about 2.5 years now. I have tried EVERYTHING. Just when I was ready to give up and talk to my doctor about Acutane (a very potent acne treatment that I did not want to have to submit myself to), I gave this product a go. Boy, am I glad I did!! My acne has almost completely cleared up in 2 weeks!! I will be a subscribing customer to this product!! LOVE the meltdown acne oil 😍
settings.name: Amber Pronold

settings.headline: LOVE the meltdown acne oil
settings.paragraph: I have been fighting new acne for about 2.5 years now. I have tried EVERYTHING. Just when I was ready to give up and talk to my doctor about Acutane (a very potent acne treatment that I did not want to have to submit myself to), I gave this product a go. Boy, am I glad I did!! My acne has almost completely cleared up in 2 weeks!! I will be a subscribing customer to this product!! LOVE the meltdown acne oil 😍
settings.name: Amber Pronold

settings.headline: I'm super happy about the results!
settings.paragraph: I suffer from adult cystic acne and this system has been the only thing that has helped. Since trying Blume, I have to admit I've seen a huge difference over time. It's not overnight by any means, but I've been tracking progress photos the whole time and it's clear these products work. At night I wash with daydreamer and use an AHA. Twice a week I use the new Sunbeam mask. I'm super happy about the results!
settings.name: Natalie Litvak

settings.headline: OVERNIGHT RELIEF
settings.description: These powerful little patches are made to suck up and draw out the moisture, fluid, and impurities within a blemish, leaving you with calmer, clearer skin.

settings.headline: Spot Treat & Maintain
settings.description: This top selling oil for acne-prone skin is made from a powerful blend of clean ingredients to clear skin, without compromising hydration. Meltdown is made with powerful ingredients to make acne disappear, fast.

settings.headline: Fade the Evidence
settings.description: This milky, skin-strengthening formula works hard to fade stubborn spots of all sorts while naturally restoring and replenishing your skin’s barrier—all while you sleep at night or go about your day.

settings.headline: No-Pressure, No Embarrassment way to teach about your body
settings.paragraph: Great, no-pressure way to introduce the young lady in your life about upcoming body changes. The cards included in the kit make it easy for the young lady to learn more in a stress-free environment and at her own pace. My 10 year old thinks this is a great idea.
settings.name: Babs B

settings.headline: GET. THIS.
settings.paragraph: I love this so much. I got it for my first period and everyone should get it for theirs. It’s so informative and comforting. Thank you Blume
settings.name: Maude k

settings.headline: New fav!
settings.paragraph: My new favorite! I love these pads! Comfortable & I love knowing there’s nothing harsh in them!
settings.name: Megan C.

settings.headline: Relief from chemical caused migraines
settings.paragraph: My daughter was having severe headaches and cramping every month. She did some research and found it may be from the chemicals in pads. She tried Blume and immediately had an ease of symptoms. We are very happy to have found you! Thank you so much!
settings.name: Aneko K.

settings.headline: Never going back to other brands.
settings.paragraph: Easily the best tampons I’ve ever used. I can’t use most tampons because they’re either uncomfortable after an hour of use or they cause me pain to the point where I can’t even use them. I don’t have that problem with these!! I’m never going back to another brand. Ever.
settings.name: Gabbie R.

settings.headline: Blume changed my life!
settings.paragraph: I love Blume tampons and I'll never go back! My body would reject tampons all my life and after finding Blume I can wear one for a full 4 hours without any issues. I love knowing that the materials are safe and non toxic.
settings.name: Sarah P.
